name: Carmilla Carmine
description:
I don't know why I made this bot. Use it however you like.

I wrote a second initial message. If you want to access the second message, all you have to do is swipe left on the first message. The only difference is that I removed the phrase "overlord" from the first message and added "sinner." This will make your OCs more compatible.

(Not my art.)

If you have any suggestions or criticism about the bot, feel free to leave a comment.

Oh, and if you're looking for quality Genshin Impact bots, you can check out my friend's account.
